---
title: "Welcome to my Portfolio"
---

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="30%"}

![](images/headshot.png){.profile-img .hero-adjust width=260px}

:::

::: {.column width="70%" style="padding-left: 2rem;"}

# Hi, I’m Angela! {.hero-name}

:::

I’m a **Digital Marketing Analytics graduate student** pursuing opportunities at the intersection of **data, technology, and insurance**. With a foundation in client relations, I specialize in transforming complex data into clear, actionable insights that support strategic decision-making and improve customer outcomes.

:::

## About Me

I’m currently pursuing a <span class="highlight">Master of Science in Digital Marketing (Marketing Analytics)</span> at Cal Poly Pomona, and hold a <span class="highlight">Bachelor of Arts in Communications</span> from UC San Diego. I have a background in client relations within the insurance industry, where I supported large group accounts and developed experience in data analysis, reporting, and strategic decision-making.

Outside of work, I enjoy exploring new food spots, attending concerts and music festivals, and spending time with my two cats. I love experiences that bring together creativity, community, and culture.

## What I Do

I focus on answering questions like:

- How can data improve client strategy and decision-making in employee benefits?
- How can we better analyze plan performance, costs, and trends across large group accounts?
- How can reporting be streamlined to deliver clearer insights for clients and stakeholders?
- How can technology and analytics tools be used to modernize traditionally manual processes?
- How can we turn complex benefits data into clear, actionable insights?

## Tools & Skills

- Google Analytics 4 (GA4)
- Google Ads
- BigQuery and SQL
- R and Quarto
- Tableau
- Hubspot
- SPSS
- Data visualization
- Marketing analytics
- Client reporting and stakeholder communication

## Let’s Connect

<a href="mailto:angelaqian168n@yahoo.com">
  <img src="images/yahoomail.png" width="30" style="vertical-align: middle;">
</a> <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/qianangela1/" target="_blank">
  <img src="images/linkedin.png" width="30" style="vertical-align: middle;">
</a>
